# CurateTube

> A community-curated public database of YouTube videos and creators. Contributors submit, moderators curate, and the community surfaces the best of YouTube via suggestions and time-anchored leaderboards.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CurateTube and how community curation works.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle personal data, audit identity, and account deletion.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Acceptable use rules for the CurateTube community.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Sign in or create an account to participate.
